caption: A man with a beard and short dark hair is recorded in a studio setting against a background of dark, ribbed acoustic foam. He is wearing a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. A professional microphone, mounted on a boom arm with a label that reads "Rode Podcast", is positioned in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man holds his right hand to his forehead in a gesture of frustration or deep thought. As the clip progresses, he speaks, his mouth opening and closing while his gaze shifts slightly. In the final moments, he extends his left arm and hand outward toward the side of the frame, gesturing as he continues to talk. The camera remains in a steady medium close-up shot, capturing his upper body and the recording equipment.
